description: Visual acoustic behavior profiles for microphone-recorded respiratory cough classes.

visual_interpretation_rules.higher_value: Greater intensity or prominence in acoustic behavior
visual_interpretation_rules.balanced_pattern: Feature distribution close to healthy baseline
visual_interpretation_rules.irregular_pattern: Uneven feature distribution indicating abnormal acoustic behavior

covid19.waveform_characteristics: Repeated cough bursts with moderate to high amplitude variation
covid19.energy_distribution: Uneven energy concentration with noticeable burst-to-burst variability
covid19.spectral_behavior: Elevated mid and high frequency components with irregular transitions
covid19.acoustic_pattern: Dry cough-like behavior with repeated respiratory bursts

feature_visual_behavior.rms_std: Noticeable energy variability between cough events

visual_comparison_notes.vs_healthy_cough: Shows greater irregularity and respiratory instability
visual_comparison_notes.vs_sneezing: Less explosive but more repetitive acoustic behavior

covid19.fingerprint_description: Radar pattern typically shows elevated frequency-related features with moderate energy variability.

healthy_cough.waveform_characteristics: Stable cough waveform with controlled amplitude
healthy_cough.energy_distribution: Balanced energy levels across cough segments
healthy_cough.spectral_behavior: Uniform frequency distribution without excessive high-frequency activity

visual_comparison_notes.vs_disease_classes: More stable and uniform acoustic behavior

healthy_cough.fingerprint_description: Radar pattern appears balanced and symmetric across all major acoustic features.

sneezing.waveform_characteristics: Very sharp transient waveform with strong peak amplitude
sneezing.spectral_behavior: Strong high-frequency activity and rapid transitions
sneezing.acoustic_pattern: Explosive respiratory event with abrupt onset and decay

visual_comparison_notes.vs_healthy_cough: Far more explosive and short-lived acoustic behavior
visual_comparison_notes.vs_covid19: Higher peak intensity but less repetitive respiratory activity

sneezing.fingerprint_description: Radar pattern typically shows strong spikes in energy and transient-frequency features.

visualization_summary_template: This visualization compares your microphone-recorded respiratory sound profile with known respiratory acoustic patterns to highlight similarities and deviations across major acoustic features.
